creator: des@FreeBSD.org
text:
1) Create a ticket anywhere in Bugzilla
2) Using a throwaway email account, comment on the ticket
3) Mark the throwaway email account as a spammer
4) Verify that the comment is marked as spam
5) Notice that the spammer's name and email address are still shown on the spam comment
6) Close the ticket
7) Bugzilla will email a notice to the originator and everyone who has interacted with the ticket, including the spammer
